properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 46/23
 EFFECTIVE 01JAN24. THE ARCTIC NAV AND METAREAS WILL COMMENCE BRODCASTING THEIR INMARSAT WARNINGS AND FORECASTS USING NUMERIC NAV OR METAREA IDENTIFIERS.
 THIS IA A TEST MESSAGE USING THE NUMERIC NAVAREA 19 IDENTIFIER TO ABELE MARINERS TO CHECK THEIR INMARSAT-C OR MINI-C RECIVERS.
 VESSELS RECIVING THIS MESSAGE. HAVE INMARSAT-C OR MINI-C RECIVERS CAPABLE OF RECOGNIZING MESSAGES ADRESSED USING NUMERIC ARCTIC NAV AND METAREA IDENTFIERS AND WILL CONTINUE TO RECEIVE ARCTIC NAV AND METAREA WARNINGA AND FORCASTS AFTHER 01JAN24.
